title: Serah's Home
description: Serah has her altar; now she wants a door that does not answer to the inn. Build the house, assign her as resident at the management block, then talk to her to finish.

objectives.text: Receive the house plot token from Serah.
Place and build the house prefab.
Assign Serah as resident on the house management block.
Talk to Serah to complete the quest.
